It could probably just be a bearer token and then we'll define the type of warf in the interface maybe or something like that. I'd like to see it a bit more generic so that when we configure the mock vero for instance we pass in the type of authorization and then there is just a bare token secret so we might reuse the same bearer token across multiple mock services. but we could also pass in different types of oAuth if that makes sense. For now I think we should support all the ones that the analyst portal supports. And the take down issue and service supports, which I think from memory is basic off HMAC and bearer token.
